seoTitle: Pikes Creek vs Pilerwa — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Pikes Creek and Pilerwa. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Pikes Creek vs Pilerwa: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Pikes Creek and Pilerwa.
heading: Pikes Creek vs Pilerwa — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Pikes Creek, Queensland and Pilerwa, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Pilerwa has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Pikes Creek (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Pikes Creek or Pilerwa safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Pikes Creek has a flood risk score of 43/100, while Pilerwa scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Pikes Creek scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Pilerwa scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Pikes Creek or Pilerwa?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Pilerwa has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.48% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
